Root cause identified: benchmark was apples-to-oranges - NG read_raster(file_mode='r') defers disk I/O to tool call (included in timer); legacy pre-loads before timer. Fix: switched to file_mode='m' (memory-backed) for fair comparison. Structural fixes applied: (1) wbgeotiff single-band fast path in read_band_bytes bypassing per-pixel extraction loop; (2) wbraster read_native_data single-band fast path avoiding intermediate buffer; (3) find_noflow_cells extracted to 1-tool-1-file; uses Arc<BandView> hot loop (legacy-style thread+channel parallelism); (4) benchmark harness fixed: remove_raster_from_memory each iteration + untimed warmup run to amortise thread spawn cost. Final NG runs (2026-04-30; memory-backed; warmup): 2.46|2.30|2.26|2.16|2.15 (median=2.260; min=2.150; max=2.460). STATUS: PARITY - median 2.26s vs legacy 2.29s (~1% difference; within noise).
